code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Infra_WorkerNode] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Infra_WorkerNode] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Infra_WorkerNode] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Infra_IngressController]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Infra_IngressController] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Infra_RedisCache] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Infra_RedisCache] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Infra_IngressController]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Infra_RedisCache] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Infra_IngressController)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个宠物洗衣机的完整状态机，核心流程是：宠物创建后进入Idle状态，点击开始洗涤后进入Washing，洗完可以烘干，最后折叠完成。但还要考虑应用重启后的恢复逻辑，以及健康度衰减机制。
明白了，主干是Idle → Washing → WashComplete → Drying → DryComplete → Folding → CycleComplete → Idle。关于Washing阶段，我需要确认：计时器部分要拆多细？我看到有Every 0.5s轮询剩余时间的逻辑。
Washing内部要两层嵌套：外层区分TimerRunning和TimerComplete，内层TimerRunning里有个SaveState和UpdateUI的循环，每0.5秒更新界面并持久化。注意SaveState要存endTime、type是wash、还有petID。
好的，Washing复合状态已画好，TimerRunning内部有SaveState→UpdateUI→SaveState的循环。TimerComplete分支走CancelTimer→ClearState→SendNotification，最终连到Infra_IngressController发推送。
对，但Drying阶段的基础设施要换一下——TimerRunning2用RedisCache做状态存储，TimerComplete2走LoadBalancer发通知，最后回写到EtcdCluster。这样能和Washing形成对比。
已调整，Drying内部TimerRunning2用RedisCache持久化，SaveState2存的是type:.dry。TimerComplete2路径是CancelTimer2→ClearState2→SendNotification2→Infra_EtcdCluster。
CycleComplete阶段最关键，要更新宠物健康度到100，状态变happy，记录lastLaundryDate，cyclesCompleted加1，还要更新streak。这个复合状态从RedisCache开始，最后写到IngressController。
CycleComplete的入口是Folding状态对吧？用户点击折叠后触发。还有，RecoveryCheck这个分支怎么处理？我看到Washing和Drying都有App Reopened的转移。
是的，RecoveryCheck是应用重启后的恢复逻辑。从RedisCache加载UserDefaults，验证endTime是否存在、是否合理（不能太未来也不能太过去），然后计算实际剩余时间，根据结果跳回Washing、WashComplete、Drying、DryComplete，或者如果数据损坏就回Idle。
RecoveryCheck画好了，四个出口都连上了。现在处理HealthDecay——Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete都会因为Time Passes触发健康度衰减？
没错，HealthDecay从EtcdCluster开始，检查lastLaundryDate，计算daysSince和cycleFrequencyDays的比值，健康度公式是100乘以那个比例。要分五个档位：100-75%是Happy，75-50% Neutral，50-25% Sad，25-1% Very Sad，0%就进Dead状态。
HealthDecay画好了，UpdateState之后连到WorkerNode。Dead状态最终回写到EtcdCluster，标记Pet Dies。Idle状态我加个注释说明：无活跃计时器、可以开始洗涤、健康度持续衰减。
WashComplete和DryComplete也加上注释吧。WashComplete要说明通知已发送、可以开始烘干、宠物在等待；DryComplete是通知已发送、准备折叠、点击完成。
三个注释都加上了。我检查一下整体结构：Washing的SaveState和Drying的SaveState2，UserDefaults的字段分别是type:.wash和type:.dry，这个区分对吗？
对的，这样RecoveryCheck时能根据type判断恢复到哪个阶段。还有，CalculateRemaining和CalculateRemaining2都是Every 0.5s触发，remaining0回TimerRunning，≤0进TimerComplete，这个条件别写反了。
发现个问题：我之前把CalculateRemaining到TimerComplete的条件写成remaining=0了，应该是remaining≤0。还有TimerRunning2的父状态标注，我确认一下是Infra_IngressController对吗？
是的，TimerRunning2父状态是Infra_IngressController，TimerComplete2是Infra_LoadBalancer。这两个和Washing阶段的Infra_WorkerNode形成三层不同的基础设施依赖。
已修正remaining≤0的条件。CycleComplete里的UpdatePetHealth注释我也补全了：health=100，state=.happy，lastLaundryDate=now，cyclesCompleted+=1，streak updated。
ValidateState的验证逻辑注释再明确下：检查endTime是否存在、是否合理、不能太未来、不能太过去。CalculateHealth的公式也写清楚：daysSince除以cycleFrequencyDays，健康度是100乘这个比例。
两个注释都完善了。最终确认一下：所有基础设施节点——EtcdCluster、WorkerNode、IngressController、RedisCache、LoadBalancer——都正确关联到对应状态了吗？

都对了。Pet Created从EtcdCluster进Idle，Washing用WorkerNode，Drying的TimerRunning2用IngressController、TimerComplete2用LoadBalancer、最后回EtcdCluster，CycleComplete从RedisCache到IngressController，HealthDecay从EtcdCluster到WorkerNode，RecoveryCheck用RedisCache。
